arts.ttl: Wolves vs Brighton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Wolves welcome Brighton & Hove Albion to Molineux in the Premier League this afternoon. Vitor Pereira’s team are searching for a response, after their six-game winning run was ended at Manchester City last Friday.
